allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(e['Output']\) for e in json.load\(sys.stdin\)[-3:]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(e['Output'].strip\(\)\) for e in json.load\(sys.stdin\)[-2:]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(e['ExitCode'], e['Output'].strip\(\)\) for e in json.load\(sys.stdin\)[-3:]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['labels']['job'], '-', t['health']\) for t in d['data']['activeTargets']]")
